overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic corporate building in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks through a multi-level atrium with a central illuminated tree, passes through a reception area with bamboo gardens and fallen bodies, and enters a large executive conference room with dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corporate atrium with central tree

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the large atrium, approaching the central illuminated tree

entered.detail: large tree with glowing foliage in a planter, serving as the focal point of the atrium
horizontal blue neon light strips lining the upper levels of the atrium
multi-level open architecture with glass railings and walkways
elevated walkways on the upper floors with glass barriers
small red lights on the right side walls indicating floor levels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a vast multi-level atrium of a futuristic corporate building. A large illuminated tree stands in the center, surrounded by glowing blue neon strips and red indicator lights on the upper levels. The camera walks forward through the open marble-floored space.

scene_state.functional_zone: reception area with bamboo garden and fallen bodies

events.description: moves past the central tree into a side reception area with natural light from windows
discovers bodies on the floor indicating recent combat or violence

agents.ego_description: walking past the reception desk and observing the bodies on the floor

notable_agents.action: body lying face down near the reception desk
body lying on the floor near the sofa

entered.detail: modern black reception desk with curved design
tall bamboo plants in illuminated rectangular planters against the glass wall
low-profile modern sofa with geometric design near the desk
glass walls separating the reception area from the exterior

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the central tree into a reception area featuring bamboo planters and modern furniture. Several bodies lie on the floor indicating recent violence. The space transitions from the open atrium to a more enclosed area with glass partitions and mixed lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to executive conference room

events.description: enters a narrow corridor leaving the reception area behind
approaches and enters the doorway to the conference room

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor toward the conference room entrance

entered.detail: dark smooth walls of the narrow connecting corridor
rectangular screen with yellow border mounted on the corridor wall
open doorway leading into the large conference room with bright interior

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow corridor with dark walls and overhead lighting, leaving the reception area behind. It approaches an open doorway revealing the interior of a large conference room.

scene_state.functional_zone: large executive conference room with long table

events.description: enters the large conference room with long wooden table and dramatic overhead lighting
slows and pans around the conference table examining the room interior

agents.ego_description: walking around the conference table and examining the room's interior details

entered.detail: long rectangular wooden conference table with documents scattered on surface
modern ergonomic office chairs arranged around the table
dramatic striped overhead light fixture with multiple parallel beams
glass walls overlooking the atrium with the illuminated tree visible outside

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a large dimly lit conference room featuring a long wooden table with office chairs. A dramatic striped ceiling light fixture illuminates the space. The camera walks around the table, revealing glass walls that overlook the atrium, and explores the room's entirety.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic corporate interior that transforms from a vast, glowing atrium into a dimly lit, private executive space. It begins by moving across a marble floor toward a large illuminated tree centered within a multi-level hall defined by blue neon strips and red indicator lights. As the camera passes the tree, the open space narrows into a reception area where bamboo planters and modern furniture surround several fallen bodies, shifting the mood from corporate grandeur to one of recent violence. The scene then transitions through a dark, narrow corridor with overhead lighting before opening into a large conference room. Finally, the camera explores the room's interior, circling a long wooden table under a dramatic striped ceiling fixture while glass walls reveal the atrium left behind.
